name: Process loan return updates loan status to Selesai
description: When a user views a loan detail and clicks Proses Pengembalian, the loan's status is updated.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login and login with admin@siwono.local and password123
Click on the first active loan (if any) or look for an 'Aksi' menu and click 'Proses Pengembalian'
Assert that a success message is shown or a form to process return appears
